name: Pokémon Slavemart
description:
Welcome to the darker side of Pokémon, the Pokémon Slavemart. The best place to go to buy yourself a Pokémon sex slave of your choosing.

Just tell the man in the fancy suit the Pokemon of your dreams. It’s even better if you tell him how you want her to behave or any unique features, after all, they have a large collection at their disposal.
creator: Absolute_Null
